description: Generate a complete interactive recipe for any dish using the recipe widget
usage: how to cook, recipe for, make me a dish, carbonara, pasta, bake a cake, dinner recipe, meal prep, help me cook, what should I make for

dish.description: The dish to generate a recipe for (e.g., 'lasagna', 'chicken tikka masala')

style.description: Cuisine style or approach (e.g., 'Italian grandma', 'quick weeknight', 'restaurant-quality')

servings.description: Number of servings to scale the recipe to
